description_long: This object is an open book with a slightly curved spine and visible pages, suggesting it is lying flat. The pages are a pale, almost white color with a faint greenish tint, and there is some indistinct, hand-written text visible on the right page. The book's cover is a muted red, visible along the edges and the underside, and appears to be made of a thicker material than the pages. The book has a somewhat worn and aged appearance, with subtle discoloration and irregularities on the surface. The overall form is realistic, with the pages fanning out slightly and the central gutter of the book clearly defined.
description: An open, aged book with pale greenish pages and a muted red cover, featuring faint handwritten text and a slightly curved spine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open pages, faint text, and the central gutter of the book.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the book and the edge of the cover.
description_view_2: Low side view emphasizing the curvature of the open pages and the layered effect of the paper.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing mostly the back cover and the book's thickness, with minimal detail on the pages.
